mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_invitation(org_id, team_id, email, invitee_name, role_hint, token, status, expires_at, created_by) VALUES(#{orgId}, #{teamId}, #{email}, #{inviteeName}, #{roleHint}, #{token}, 'PENDING', #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_id, team_id, email, invitee_name, role_hint, token, status, expires_at FROM agency_invitation WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
